follow_ups.note: Existing parse_options() unit tests will fail with the new two-tier CLI interface (tests assume old single-tier syntax). Phase 5 must update them.
stop command currently dispatches to docker compose down (same as delete). Phase 3 must differentiate: stop → docker compose stop (pause); delete → docker compose down (remove).
CMD_EXPLICIT global removed. Phase 5 should confirm no remaining consumers in codebase or tests.
